## Start with context

Ask why the image appears beside the surrounding text. Describe the information or action it contributes.

<KnowledgeCheck
  prompt="What should determine an image description?"
  options={["Its file name", "Its purpose in context", "Its pixel dimensions"]}
  answer="Its purpose in context"
  explanation="The surrounding context determines which information a screen-reader user needs from the image."
/>
